ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_number" TEXT /* Product number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "finish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finish */,
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thickness */,
  "length_id" INTEGER /* ID of the length */,
  "width_id" INTEGER /* ID of the width */,
  "packaging_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packaging format */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_manual_url" TEXT /* URL of the product manual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_finish_id FOREIGN KEY ("finish_id") REFERENCES finishes ("finish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("length_id") REFERENCES lengths ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_width_id FOREIGN KEY ("width_id") REFERENCES widths ("width_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_thickness_id FOREIGN KEY ("thickness_id") REFERENCES thicknesses ("thickness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_packaging_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("packaging_format_id") REFERENCES packaging_formats ("packaging_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finishes" (
  "finish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finish */,
  "finish_name" TEXT /* Name of the finish */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the finish */,
  "finish_code" TEXT /* Code for the finish (e.g., BLK, CHR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thicknesses" (
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thickness */,
  "thickness_value" TEXT /* Value of the thickness (e.g., 3/64 in, 5/64 in) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thickness */,
  "thickness_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the thickness (e.g., in, mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thickness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "length_value" TEXT /* Value of the length (e.g., 6 ft, 8 ft) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the length */,
  "length_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the length (e.g., ft, m) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widths" (
  "width_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each width */,
  "width_value" TEXT /* Value of the width (e.g., 1 9/16 in, 1 21/32 in) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the width */,
  "width_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the width (e.g., in, mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("width_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packaging_formats" (
  "packaging_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packaging format */,
  "packaging_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the packaging format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the packaging format */,
  "package_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products per package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packaging_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_products, edit_orders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
